summary: Replayed ADR 0281 from exact-main source commit `55ccb056fd59e6a69c82709d6f11eb6a6a2bd6dd` on immediate predecessor baseline `ef412b0f061517b64920b7328102e23b89b0774d` / `0.177.147`, cleared the controller-local quiet-window gate, reconverged PostgreSQL, Docker-runtime recovery, Keycloak, GlitchTip, and NGINX publication, and reverified the public health, TLS, OIDC, and event-ingest path at `errors.example.com`. `origin/main` then advanced to `bdd326164a37f849ca435f5bf32e550f00c5a89b` / `0.177.148` / `0.130.93` with ADR 0309 ops-portal and protected release-surface changes only, so repository release `0.177.149` integrates the GlitchTip exact-main proof while preserving the already-current platform version `0.130.93` instead of bumping it again.

verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-glitchtip-recovery-tests-r1-0.177.147.txt` records `11 passed in 0.47s` for the Docker-recovery and GlitchTip replay helpers.
`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-targeted-latest-main-tests-r1-0.177.147.txt` records `42 passed in 7.24s` on the exact replay candidate.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0281-converge-glitchtip-r5-0.177.147.txt` shows the controller-local quiet-window gate cleared between `2026-04-03T01:10:24Z` and `2026-04-03T01:10:55Z`, after which public verification and the event smoke passed with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=321 changed=0 failed=0`, `localhost : ok=30 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=46 changed=5 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=70 changed=0 failed=0`.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-current-public-surface-r4-0.177.147.txt` shows `HTTP/2 200` for `https://errors.example.com/api/0/internal/health/`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-current-public-cert-r4-0.177.147.txt` shows `subject=CN=errors.example.com` issued by Let's Encrypt `E8`.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-public-auth-config-r3-0.177.147.json` records `status: 200`, provider `keycloak`, display name `LV3 Keycloak`, and client id `glitchtip` with the `https://sso.example.com/realms/lv3/.well-known/openid-configuration` issuer document.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-event-smoke-r4-0.177.147.txt` records `status: ok`, event `58285bc1956f4a90a19fe3ea393f9f38`, and issue `PLATFORM-FINDINGS-B` at `https://errors.example.com/platform-findings/issues/11`.

verification.check: Post-replay mainline delta analysis and protected release integration
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-mainline-delta-analysis-r1-0.177.148.txt` shows the move from replay base `ef412b0f061517b64920b7328102e23b89b0774d` to `origin/main` `bdd326164a37f849ca435f5bf32e550f00c5a89b` only touched ADR 0309 ops-portal and protected release surfaces, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-mainline-release-write-r1-0.177.149.txt` records the successful `0.177.149` release cut that promoted this receipt onto canonical truth.

verification.check: Final repository automation bundle on the release-written tree
verification.observed: After refreshing the dependency diagram and platform manifest on the final `0.177.149` tree, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-mainline-validate-r3-0.177.149.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-mainline-remote-validate-r2-0.177.149.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1-0.177.149.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-adr-0281-mainline-check-build-server-r1-0.177.149.txt` all passed.

notes: The exact replay proved GlitchTip from the immediate predecessor mainline candidate before `origin/main` moved to ADR 0309 release `0.177.148`; the delta analysis shows the later mainline move did not change GlitchTip-owned live surfaces.
Repository release `0.177.149` therefore promotes verified GlitchTip truth while preserving platform version `0.130.93` instead of issuing another platform-version bump.
The April 3 receipt supersedes the earlier partial `2026-04-01-adr-0281-glitchtip-mainline-live-apply.json` record for canonical mainline truth.
